title: Hideous Men
body:
# Hideous Men

Denver experimental duo, formed September 2009 by **Ryan McRyhew** and **Kristi Schaefer**. Named after David Foster Wallace's *Brief Interviews with Hideous Men*. Active in the Rhinoceropolis/Denver DIY scene.

## Connection to Colin

Colin remixed Hideous Men on **REMIX09** (December 30, 2009) — track 4, titled "TALONS [HIDEOUS MEN]" — just three months after the band formed. This is among the earliest documented collaborative connections in Colin's archive.

Hideous Men's farewell show (before McRyhew and Schaefer moved to Chicago) was held at **Rhinoceropolis** in June 2010, placing both Colin's orbit and Ryan McRyhew's in the same Rhinoceropolis context from the very beginning.

Ryan McRyhew later performed as **Entrancer** and **Thug Entrancer**, and co-released with Colin on the Noumenal Loom compilation *Neotropical* (posthumous, 2020).

## Notes

- Hideous Men disbanded when the duo relocated to Chicago (Kristi Schaefer continuing education)
- Kristi Schaefer's solo activity after the band has not yet been researched
- The Westword Q&A linked below (Feb 2010) describes the band's aesthetic and Denver scene context

## Sources

- [Westword Q&A — Ryan McRyhew and Kristi Schaefer of Hideous Men](https://www.westword.com/music/qanda-with-ryan-mcryhew-and-kristi-schaefer-of-hideous-men-5706247/)
- [Westword — Hideous Men farewell show](https://www.westword.com/music/hideous-men-says-goodbye-to-denver-and-hello-to-chicago-farewell-show-slated-for-june-30-5673352)
- [alphabets REMIX09 — Bandcamp](https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/remix09)
